shellCommands.command:
/bin/bash -lc "mempal search \"downshift useCombobox useSelect isItemDisabled initialHighlightedIndex defaultHighlightedIndex disabled initial highlight\" --json --top-k 5
sed -n '1,240p' AGENTS.md
printf '\\n--- repo status ---\\n'
git status --short
printf '\\n--- top-level ---\\n'
rg --files -g '"'!node_modules'"' | head -80"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,180p' src/hooks/useCombobox/reducer.js
sed -n '270,360p' src/hooks/utils.js
sed -n '1,180p' src/hooks/useSelect/reducer.js
sed -n '1,150p' src/hooks/useSelect/utils.ts
sed -n '1,150p' src/hooks/useCombobox/utils.js"

/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"function getNonDisabledIndex|export function getNonDisabledIndex|const getNonDisabledIndex\" src/utils.js && sed -n '180,270p' src/utils.js && rg -n \"getHighlightedIndexOnOpen\" src test | head -80 && rg -n \"initialHighlightedIndex|defaultHighlightedIndex\" src/hooks/useCombobox/__tests__ src/hooks/useSelect/__tests__ test/useCombobox.test.tsx test/useSelect.test.tsx | head -160"

/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"getHighlightedIndexOnOpen|defaultProps\" src/hooks/__tests__ src/hooks/useCombobox/__tests__/utils.test.js src/hooks/useSelect/__tests__/utils.test.ts | head -100
sed -n '1,180p' src/hooks/__tests__/utils.test.js
sed -n '1,100p' src/hooks/testUtils.js"
/bin/bash -lc "git diff --check && git diff -- src/hooks/utils.js && git status --short && node -e \"const p=require('./package.json'); console.log(p.scripts)\""

errors: `--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
`--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
